name: Arjun Mehta
bio: BUET roommate, now a senior engineer at a Dhaka fintech. Bonded over all-nighters and bad coffee.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: Childhood family friend doing her PhD in public health in Toronto. My go-to for serious life advice.

name: Tariq Hossain
bio: Grew up on the same street in Mirpur. Now in Chittagong for work. Every call feels like no time has passed.

name: Priya Kapoor
bio: Met at a design sprint in Bangalore. We've since backpacked through Nepal and Sri Lanka together.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: Met via open-source on GitHub. Never in person, but we talk weekly. Cybersecurity engineer in Atlanta.

name: Sumaiya Akter
bio: Master's study partner from NSU. Now a data analyst at a UN agency. Kept sane by shared misery.

name: Leo Ferreira
bio: Met at a hostel in Istanbul in 2023. Freelance photographer from São Paulo. Three days felt like three years.

name: Fatema Begum
bio: Best friend since Class 9. Pediatrician now, still running the book club we both attend monthly.

name: Yuna Park
bio: Met at a UX conference in Singapore. Product designer in Seoul. We trade Figma files and brutal feedback.

name: Rafiq Uddin
bio: First cousin in London. Inseparable as kids every Eid. The time difference makes months disappear.
